title: Quorum — Distributed Systems Lab
description: A deterministic distributed-systems simulator: Raft and Multi-Paxos consensus, PBFT and HotStuff Byzantine fault tolerance (survive malicious replicas), a Chord DHT, CRDTs, gossip/SWIM failure detection, vector clocks and 2PC/3PC, all from scratch on one seeded discrete-event kernel with a controllable network, time-travel scrubbing and live invariant checking.
